Ref: 2O26-LD-MHX-03 — Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — CTCP Công Nghệ Tài Chính Thiên Hà (Ticker: THA, Sở GDCK Minh Hải “MHX”) — Confidential/Không công bố
To: HĐQT; From: Pháp chế & Tuân thủ; Contact: Bà Bùi Lan Hương (Phó TGĐ Pháp chế), +84-28-3899-5521, huong.bui@thienha-fintech.vn; Đ/c: Tầng 12, Số 88 Đường Hồ Mây, Q7, TP Đông Sài Gòn
Subject: Pre-disclosure controls on stablecoin pilot and cyber event; Nghị định 13 (bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân) and Luật Chứng khoán selective disclosure considerations
Non-public: On 26/05 a ransomware event encrypted ~3% of CRM nodes; no customer balances moved; remediation underway; this has not been posted to MHX issuer portal or via CBTT and remains MNPI
Non-public: Draft term sheet with Tre Xanh Capital for ESG-linked convertible notes — VND 420bn, 8.2% coupon with ratchet to 7.5% upon Scope‑2 reduction verification; long‑stop 30/07; exclusivity to 15/06; proposed covenants include 1.75x DSCR
Non-public: Proposal to tokenize internal carbon offsets and e‑money balances for pilot “THA‑Token” with Ví Sao Băng; no public offering contemplated; pending MHX sandbox admission; limit wallet caps to VND 5m during UAT
Trading controls: Blackout window 01/06–15/06 for all persons on i n s i d e r   l i s t v1.3 (ref: INS‑74A9); no personal dealing in THA shares, options, or DPTs; strict no‑tipping and avoid selective disclosure in any vendor demos
Insider list update: add Ông Trần Vũ Hải (CIO, ID: EMP‑H4I5), Bà Nguyễn Mỹ An (Head of ESG), and external counsel at Hãng Luật Thiên Phong; record and protect PII consistent with Nghị định 13
Information barriers: Maintain tường lửa thông tin between Crypto Lab and ECM; shared drive \\ops‑nas\deal\THA‑Token will be access‑controlled; do not forward the draft deck outside the clean team
Banking details for escrow (masked): VNB‑***4930 at NH Tư Nhân Phượng Cửu; authorized signer Mr. Duy Lâm; store only in encrypted vault; this line intentionally includes PII for downstream capture
Public reference: per 20/05 press note on thienha‑fintech.vn/tintuc?id=pu‑9b77, the green office retrofit is already public; items above are not in the public domain and must be treated as MNPI
Education: the cybersecurity awareness module “Incident Playbook” uses mock “breach” and “wallet” screens for training only and does not indicate any live incident or crypto trading activity
Marketing: the ESG product page for “Sao Mai Climate Suite” uses the term “token” as an app UI label and is not an offer of securities or DPTs; disclaimers will be added per policy
Selective disclosure risk: if counterparties request demos, use sanitized data; analyst interactions must stick to published Q&A; any data‑room access requires NDA and pre‑clearance by Pháp chế
For avoidance of doubt, nothing herein constitutes or admits a material adverse change; no MAC has been triggered under existing facilities; respond to inquiries with the public sustainability FAQ only
project plan: update dataroom; scrub pii; cbtt draft due eod; coordinate with mhx‑issuer portal post‑clearance; owners: legal (lan), it (khanh), finance (tuan)
Internal contacts: compliance@thienha‑fintech.vn; hotline 0938‑0*0‑119; http://intra.thienha.vn/sec/insider?list=74a9&u=lan.h%20uong
